_comment: Damodaran FCFF inputs for TSMC (TSM). Populate from Wisesheets 10Y data. Amounts in USD millions.

_notes.revenue_cagr_high: 18% reflects AI-driven HPC segment growth, N2 ramp, CoWoS expansion. Downgrade to 12-15% for bear case.
_notes.target_ebit_margin_high: 42% reflects current margin trajectory; overseas fab cost headwind caps upside. Historical range 30-45%.
_notes.sales_to_capital_ratio_high: 0.9x reflects CapEx-intensive foundry model. TSMC spends ~40-50% of revenue on CapEx.
_notes.effective_tax_rate: TSMC effective tax rate ~13% with R&D incentives
